74358.subject: Visa & MastercardвҖҷs Agentic AI payment platforms have a volume problem рҹӨ–рҹ“Ҡ; Vinyl raised $20M to replace the fax вҖҰ
74358.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1088

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Thursday! TodayвҖҷs issue is incredibly packed as weвҖҷre diving deep into finance giants Visa & Mastercard, both of which just launched agentic AI payment platforms (what itвҖҷs all about, why it matters & why payment titants have a volume problem here + bonus reads into other Visa & MastercardвҖҷs agentic AI moves, & how Google wants to be the OS for all commerce [ https://substack.com/redirect/7dbe23cb-9272-4d51-a5a0-db1949b8a62d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), Vinyl that just raised 20M to replace the fax machines in the public markets (whatвҖҷs the USP here, why itвҖҷs interesting, and what to watch for next + bonus looks into the IPOs of OpenAI [ https://substack.com/redirect/d7615084-4ec5-49ae-b49a-0a47704370cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], Anthropic [ https://substack.com/redirect/84f43597-6a1b-49a2-a5c9-204b8d259943?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], & the list of top AI & Tech VCs of 2026 [ https://substack.com/redirect/1a048d27-62ac-4b7d-a660-6374f90c4715?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and RevolutвҖҷs secret ECB restrictions (what happened, why it didnвҖҷt hurt the valuation, but could hurt the IPO + bonus dive into RevolutвҖҷs latest financials [ https://substack.com/redirect/61ba1efe-f13a-4d89-bffe-937998af6002?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], & deep dive into their AI model for money [ https://substack.com/redirect/c24c675c-2fe2-417c-89bd-97d6231b413b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So letвҖҷs jump straight into the finnovative stuff рҹҢ¶пёҸ
Visa and MastercardвҖҷs Agentic AI payment platforms have a volume problem рҹӨ–рҹ“Ҡ
The news рҹ—һпёҸ On June 10, finance giants Visa $V  and Mastercard $MA  each launched agentic AI payment platforms.
вҶ’ Visa embedded payments into OpenAIвҖҷs ChatGPT [ https://substack.com/redirect/84f43597-6a1b-49a2-a5c9-204b8d259943?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] and built an Agentic Directory of verified agents.
вҶ’ Mastercard shipped Agent Pay for Machines, infrastructure that provisions AI agents as autonomous economic actors with their own credentials, wallets, and on-chain spending limits.
The simultaneous timing was read by most as defensive urgency: two incumbents scrambling to protect a combined $1.05 trillion market cap from an agentic economy forming outside their rails on open stablecoin [ https://substack.com/redirect/edcfc3af-882e-4eca-bd57-ec831a5be9c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] protocols like x402 [ https://substack.com/redirect/3bf546e4-bbeb-480a-a2db-62269ca51ad0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ].
That framing is popular. It may also be wrong.
By far the most instruc

74354.subject: New idea by trade_soul вҖ” check it out
74354.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @import url(https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Roboto:300,400,500,700); @import url(https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Ubuntu:300,400,500,700); @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light dark; supported-color-schemes: light dark; } .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; padding-bottom: 20px; } .main-title { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Trebuchet MS', Roboto, Ubuntu, sans-serif; font-size: 36px; line-height: 44px; font-weight: 590; color: #000 !important; } .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-container { background-color: #fff !important; } [data-ogsc] .square-btn a { background-color: #010101 !important; color: #F5F5F5 !important; } [data-ogsc] .main-title, .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #000 !important; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark ) { .main-container { background-color: #000 !important; } .square-btn a { background-color: #F5F5F5 !important; color: #010101 !important; } .main-title, .regular-text, .regular-text * { color: #FEFEFE !important; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 500px) { div.main-container > table > tbody > tr > td { padding-left: 20px !important; padding-right: 20px !important; } }       trade_soul   на которого вы подписаны, опубликовал(а) новую идею   BTC устойчив к негативу BTCUSDT, 60 #BTCUSDT #обзор BTC пока устойчиво реагирует на весь негатив вокруг⁠. Капитализац&#108

----------

----------
**Welcome back!** Claude Fable 5 had been public for one day when Microsoft limited employee access while its lawyers read Anthropic's new data terms. The same Wednesday, Visa moved your card into ChatGPT, Mastercard launched a payment system for AI agents that spend fractions of a cent and Dario Amodei asked Washington for the power to block models like the one his company shipped Tuesday. 



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Microsoft vs Fable:** What did Microsoft's lawyers find in the new Claude's terms?

* **Visa x ChatGPT:** What happens the first time ChatGPT buys the wrong thing with your card?

* **Anthropic's proposal:** Why would the most valuable private AI company ask to be regulated?

* **Mastercard's machine money:** What do AI agents buy with payments worth a fraction of a cent?


----------

----------
## [Microsoft won't clear the new Claude for its own staff](https://www.reuters.com/technology/microsoft-limits-employee-use-anthropics-claude-fable-5-over-data-retention-2026-06-10/)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e602b7ae-0fc4-49b5-9208-81b143fbb6dc/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_11.png?t=1781170265)
Caption: 

Claude Fable 5 went live Tuesday. By Wednesday, Microsoft had moved to limit employee use of it while company lawyers decide whether to allow it at all.

The dispute is the fine print we covered yesterday. Anthropic keeps every prompt and output that touches a Mythos-class model for 30 days, on every platform where the model runs, business customers included.В 

Anything its classifiers mark as a possible policy violation stays for up to two years.

Anthropic's reasoning is that jailbreaks operate across many requests, so catching them takes a stored window of evidence. It says the data never trains models and gets deleted on schedule in almost all cases.В 

Microsoft's lawyers read the same policy and saw customer data and confidential information sitting on another company's servers for a month.

The review only covers the Mythos-class line, so Opus and Sonnet aren't part of it.

Fable is also included on paid Claude plans only through June 22, then moves to usage credits. That gives Anthropic eleven days to convince corporate legal teams the retention window is survivable, and the first verdict is Microsoft's.


----------



----------
_Special highlight from our network_

74347.subject: cenovГЎ ponuka
74347.body:
DobrГҪ deЕҲ VГЎm prajem, 

na zГЎklade nГЎЕЎho stretnutia VГЎm posielam spracovanГә cenovГә ponuku.

CenovГЎ ponuka je orientaДҚnГЎ a nezГЎvГӨznГЎ, ДҚokoДҫvek sa mГҙЕҫe zmeniЕҘ, upraviЕҘ, pridaЕҘ, ubraЕҘ. VГҪslednГЎ suma vЕҫdy zГЎvisГӯ od konkrГ©tnych predstГЎv a poЕҫiadavok klienta, od druhu a mnoЕҫstva pouЕҫitГҪch ЕҫivГҪch a vЕЎetkГҪch ostatnГҪch materiГЎlov. 

Е tandardne pracujeme tak, Еҫe takto dopredu pred svadbou pripravujem ponuku, ktorГЎ je orientaДҚnГЎ. ЕӨaЕҫko dopredu urДҚiЕҘ presnГә sumu a takisto ani Vy nemusГӯte eЕЎte teraz presne vedieЕҘ koДҫko prГӯde nakoniec hostГӯ, ako sa bude sedieЕҘ, koДҫko stolov budete potrebovaЕҘ, ako sa mГҙЕҫu zmeniЕҘ VaЕЎe predstavy. :-)
Zhruba dva tГҪЕҫdne pred svadbou, ako som uЕҫ spomГӯnala, prГӯpadne podДҫa potreby skГҙr sa pripravГӯ predbeЕҫnГЎ kalkulГЎcia, ktorГЎ sa vyrГЎtava uЕҫ na zГЎklade reГЎlnych poДҚtov poloЕҫiek a poЕҫiadavok a v neposlednom rade poДҚtu hostГӯ.
VЕЎetko je to v prvom rade o komunikГЎcii. SnaЕҫГӯm sa jednaЕҘ s ДҫuДҸmi fГ©r, seriГіzne a k prГЎci pristupovaЕҘ zodpovedne.
MyslГӯm, Еҫe sa dГЎ na mЕҲa v ДҚomkoДҫvek obrГЎtiЕҘ a spoДҫahnГәЕҘ. 

KДҫudne si ponuku preЕЎtudujte a ak by ste mali akГ©koДҫvek otГЎzky, chceli sa na ДҚokoДҫvek opГҪtaЕҘ, ak by ste chceli nieДҚo zmeniЕҘ, pridaЕҘ, ubraЕҘ, prГӯpadne nastaviЕҘ si vГҪЕЎku budgetu kДҫudne sa na mЕҲa obrГЎЕҘte, rada VГЎm odpoviem, pomГҙЕҫem, poradГӯm. 
VЕЎetko som pripravila tak, aby to bolo ДҚo najjednoduchЕЎie pochopiteДҫnГ©. Ak by bolo ДҚokoДҫvek nejasnГ©, pГҪtajte sa.

Ak som na nieДҚo zabudla kДҫudne ma doplЕҲte. рҹҳү

Budem ДҚakaЕҘ za VaЕЎou spГӨtnou vГӨzbou.

Prajem krГЎsny deЕҲ.



S pozdravom / Best regards

Bc. Lucia OrtutovГЎ
Event manager/wedding coordinator

+421 907 382 402
www.dekoracnyservis.sk
info@dekoracnyservis.sk
